title: Asuka incident
wikitext:
[]: [Spoilers] Asuka incident             Quote Post by CtHuLhU » Sat May 29, 2010 8:33 am Can ya see it too? SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion » Sat May 29, 2010 8:34 am Teh Rei!

[]:             Quote Post by CtHuLhU » Sat May 29, 2010 8:39 am I mean this. [URL=http://img97.imageshack.us/img97/4538/r31z.jpg] [/URL]

[]:             Quote Post by qu4d » Sat May 29, 2010 8:49 am i do see it. nice find.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat May 29, 2010 9:26 am Yeah, that is a nice find... Just what the hell is going on? I don't know if it's supposed to be implying something about Bardiel, or something about Asuka. (The -nami conspiracy, anyone?) Or maybe even both. Very subtle and VERY suspicious, though... I wonder if it's intentional that Asuka sees this creepy grinning Rei in the plug after her "smiling" comment.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Sat May 29, 2010 9:53 am Oh shit, Asuka must have felt really lucky seeing that creepy face up that close. Dude. But yeah, nice find. Did not really notice it. I tend to step away from overanalyzing sceencaps and stuff /yeah i know, have we met Eva?/ but it kind of pays off for 'amusing' things like this. Cool find.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sat May 29, 2010 10:19 am ...why assume that's Rei? Could just as easily be a creepy superdeformed Asuka, the same way all three children were confronted by copies of themselves when in communication with an angel in the series.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat May 29, 2010 10:37 am I'm confused. I see the eye in the first pic, I don't think it's Rei though but what're we supposed to be seeing in the second pic?

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Sat May 29, 2010 10:38 am It would be nice to know which voice actress made the creepy giggles emitted by Bardiel. And yeah, that eye is a nice find. Bravo!

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Sat May 29, 2010 10:41 am PRPD: There's a circle around something and you ask what you're supposed to be seeing? Those things forming the cross kind of look like maggots (maybe maggot Asuka is fresh in my mind). Awesome find, dude.

[]:             Quote Post by Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion » Sat May 29, 2010 10:50 am It would be nice to know which voice actress made the creepy giggles emitted by Bardiel.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat May 29, 2010 11:03 am ZapX wrote: PRPD: There's a circle around something and you ask what you're supposed to be seeing?

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sat May 29, 2010 11:05 am Besides, look at the tip of her nose in 2nd pic... those needles are nowhere near her eyes. It's likely those are stabilizing rods to hold the fractured bits of her skull in place so that they set correctly.

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Sat May 29, 2010 11:06 am I dont understand are we trying to point out that something happened to asukas eye (the reason she has an eye patch in the 3.0 teaser) and the nature of why?

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Sat May 29, 2010 11:45 am Definitely did not see the Reiface there. Interesting to note that the Bardiel cross-pattern is emanating from where the right eye would be, rather than the left. Has anything ever happened to anyone's right eye in Eva before? It always seems to be the left; Rei's bandages, Soryu's lancing, Shikinami too by the looks of it...hell, even Mari's glasses only break the left lens, if I recall.

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Sat May 29, 2010 11:47 am Rei's bandages are on her right eye. I'm pretty sure Mari's eye injury is the right side too. Also, NemZ is right, those pins aren't in Asuka's eye. I prefer /a/non's explanation.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sat May 29, 2010 11:52 am Reichu wrote: Yeah, that is a nice find... Just what the hell is going on? I don't know if it's supposed to be implying something about Bardiel, or something about Asuka. (The -nami conspiracy, anyone?) Or maybe even both. Very subtle and VERY suspicious, though...

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Sat May 29, 2010 11:55 am ZapX wrote: Rei's bandages are on her right eye. I'm pretty sure Mari's eye injury is the right side too.

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Sat May 29, 2010 12:16 pm ...

[]:             Quote Post by Synapsid » Sat May 29, 2010 12:18 pm NemZ wrote: Besides, look at the tip of her nose in 2nd pic... those needles are nowhere near her eyes. It's likely those are stabilizing rods to hold the fractured bits of her skull in place so that they set correctly.
